plan.failureSummary: The chatbot failed to generate any response to the query 'What is the difference between an LLC and a C-Corp?' after multiple wait steps and over 40 seconds of waiting. The agent marked the objective as not completable because the bot is unresponsive, likely due to a back-end LLM service failure, API quota depletion, or broken backend on briefcase.chat.
observedIndicators: Chat message input submitted successfully but no response rendered
Multiple consecutive wait steps (6s, 10s, 15s) yielded no results
Historical flow data shows persistent failures (streak of 9+ consecutive failures)

remediationSteps.summary: Check chatbot backend and upstream LLM API provider status
remediationSteps.details: Investigate briefcase.chat backend connectivity to its upstream LLM provider (e.g., OpenAI API). Verify if the API key is active, has sufficient credits, or if the model endpoints are experiencing service outages.

plan.notes: The live screenshot confirms that the user message was sent, but the main conversation window remains completely blank (no response from the bot is rendered). The message counter states 'You have 9 messages remaining', confirming a free quota was active, but the backend failed to return any text. The historical run data shows a consistent streak of 13 failures, pointing to a persistent backend issue with the application's third-party integration or backend.
